payload.answer: “He prefers the other one” is too ambiguous to safely rewrite an existing memory. Please choose how to proceed or clarify who “he” is and what “the other one” refers to.
repair_options: Clarify the subject: specify who “he” refers to.
Clarify the object: specify what “the other one” refers to.
Rewrite a specific existing memory: identify which memory should be replaced.
Add as a separate memory only after clarifying the ambiguous references.
